Change_ID: A unique identifier for each schedule change in the cafeteria
Change_Description: A brief description of the change made in the cafeteria’s meal rotation schedule
Effect_Date: The date when the change became effective
Rotation_Duration: The duration of the meal rotation cycle in weeks after the change
Reason_For_Change: The justification or reason for the change in the meal rotation schedule
Department: The department responsible for implementing the change
Affected_Employees: The estimated number of employees affected by the change

Change_Description: Added vegan options to the menu
